ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation - Booking #A12345
ham.body:
Dear Priya Sharma,

Thank you for choosing SkyHigh Airlines for your travel. Please find the details of your upcoming flight below:

• Departure: 28th May 2026, 08:30 AM (New Delhi, DEL)
• Arrival: 28th May 2026, 12:45 PM (Mumbai, BOM)
• Flight Number: SH123
• Seat: 12B (Aisle)
• Check‑in: 2 hours before departure, available at <URL> or the SkyHigh app.

Baggage allowance: 1 carry‑on (up to 7 kg) + 1 checked bag (up to 23 kg).

If you need to change or cancel your booking, please visit <URL> or call our support line at +91‑80‑1234‑5678.

We look forward to serving you. Safe travels!

Best regards,

Ravi Kumar
Customer Relations
SkyHigh Airlines
+91‑80‑1234‑5678

---

This email was sent to priyasharma@example.com. If you did not book this flight, please ignore this message.

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required - Immediate Action Needed!
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Singh,

We regret to inform you that your QuickBooks/Norton invoice (Invoice #QBN-987654) has not been paid. Please review the details and make the payment within 24 hours to avoid account suspension.

• Amount Due: ₹1,25,000
• Due Date: 28th May 2026
• Payment Link: <URL>

If you have already paid, kindly send the proof of transaction to support@quickbooks.com. Failure to pay will result in suspension of billing access and potential legal action.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

QuickBooks Billing Team
+91‑22‑5555‑1234
